title: User
description: Common v1 user identity contract for internal users, service accounts, integration accounts, and scoped external users.
$comment: Sources: docs/documents/3. tech/02-TECH-01-FOUNDATION-RBAC-AUDIT-IDEMPOTENCY-EVIDENCE-REGISTRY.md and MASTER-01. User identity does not decide business permission; role and permission contracts do.

accountStatus.description: Account status. Disabled, locked, suspended, and deprovisioned accounts must not pass permission checks.

roleIds.description: Assigned role identifiers. Roles group permissions but must not replace action-level permission checks.
